description: The rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hollow_airframe.ork is currently just an external shell with surface-mounted fins. To prepare it for a high-power rocketry certification flight, model a robust internal 'Fin Can' motor mount assembly by adding an inner tube, an engine block, and exactly two centering rings. Modify the existing fins to include 'Fin tabs' (Through-The-Wall construction) extending to the motor mount. Verify that the added structural mass has not caused instability via flight simulation. Save the upgraded design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/fin_can_upgrade.ork and write a structural audit report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_can_report.txt noting the final mass, the stability margin in calibers, and confirming the addition of the structural components.
